title: Alinea Essentials
description: Official Alinea modpack, for those looking to jump straight in with only the most essential modifications.
body:
# About Alinea Essentials Modpack

The Alinea Essentials modpack is created with the goal of enhancing the Minecraft experience specifically for players on the [Alinea SMP](https://alinea.gg/) server, though it's equally functional on any other vanilla-compatible server. This pack brings together mods that focus on performance optimisation, adding proximity voice chat using [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice) for immersive multiplayer interactions, and ensuring smoother gameplay compatibility with the Alinea server.

## Key Features

- **Performance Optimization:** Selected mods aim to improve Minecraft's performance, offering a smoother and more responsive gameplay experience. This is especially beneficial for players with less powerful computers.
- **Proximity Voice Chat:** Integrated voice chat enables players to communicate with others nearby within the game world, adding a layer of realism and community engagement to the multiplayer experience.
- **Server Compatibility:** While designed with the Alinea SMP server in mind, the mods included offer quality of life improvements and gameplay enhancements that respect Minecraft's original gameplay feel.

## Why Use This Modpack?

This pack is tailored for those who want to enhance their Minecraft gameplay without altering the game's core mechanics. It's about making the game run better, making interactions more immersive, and ensuring that players can fully engage with the Alinea SMP server's unique features without compatibility issues.

While this modpack will work fine for other (vanilla-compatible) servers too, we only recommend installing it if you intend to play on Alinea.
